name: Robb's Dried Fruit Cream Scones
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chopped dried fruit (such as apricots and prunes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees F.
2. Use an ungreased baking sheet.
3. In a bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar. Stir with a fork until well mixed.
4. Add the dried fruit and raisins. Using a fork, stir in the cream until the dough holds together in a rough mass (the dough will be quite sticky).
5. Lightly flour a work surface and transfer the dough to it. Knead the dough 8-9 times.
6. Pat the dough into a circle about 10 inches in diameter.
7. For the glaze, spread the melted butter over the top and sides of the dough circle and sprinkle sugar on top.
8. Cut the circle into 12 wedges and place each piece on the baking sheet, allowing about an inch between pieces.
9. Bake for about 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
